isRegistered.description: Returns true if the token address is recorded in the registry (regardless of delisted state).

isDelisted.description: Returns true if a registered token has been delisted (hidden from the active catalog).

getToken.description: Read the full on-chain token struct: token, deployedAt, delisted flag, issuer, category, and assetType.

tokensByIssuer.description: List all token addresses registered for a given issuer wallet.

tokenCount.description: Total number of tokens registered across the platform (delisted included).

tokenAt.description: Resolve the token address at a position in the registry enumeration. Use with tokenCount to page the full catalog.

factory.description: Address of the Factory contract authorized to register tokens (the only caller of registerToken).

authority.description: Address of the PlatformAccessManager that controls who may call restricted functions.

delistToken.description: Remove a registered token from the active catalog. The record is preserved; isDelisted becomes true until relisted.

relistToken.description: Restore a previously delisted token back into the active catalog.

setFactory.description: Update the Factory address allowed to register tokens. Governance action; does not affect already-registered tokens.
